title: Meta blocks human rights accounts from reaching audiences in Saudi Arabia, UAE
author: giuliomagnifico
aiHeadline: Meta's latest move: Blocking human rights activists in Saudi Arabia and UAE, because nothing says 'freedom' like censorship.

title: Goodbye Visa and Mastercard: 130M Europeans switching to sovereign payment
author: healsdata
aiHeadline: Europeans ditch Visa and Mastercard for sovereign payments, proving that even credit cards can be patriotic.

title: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
author: tedsanders
aiHeadline: OpenAI just disproved a major geometry conjecture, proving once again that humans are slow and AI is here to do our thinking for us.

title: Tennessee man jailed 37 days for Trump meme wins settlement after lawsuit
author: ceejayoz
aiHeadline: Tennessee man jailed for 37 days over a Trump meme wins $835,000 settlement, proving that even in jail, you can still be the life of the party.

title: Qwen3.7-Max: The Agent Frontier
author: kevinsimper
aiHeadline: Qwen3.7-Max is the new frontier in AI, proving that the future of technology is as confusing as the latest diet trend.
